title: OHLC based Fine tuned forecast
author: themoneylust
selftext:
I have built a live AI trading dashboard over the past few months by fine tuning a prediction model and finally got it stable enough to run 24/7.

What started as a small forecasting experiment turned into a full multi-asset quant system with:

• AI forecast engine  
• BTC + Gold live predictions  
• TP/SL + RR filtering  
• Trade validation engine  
• Session-aware alerts  
• Live news ticker  
• Telegram signal delivery  
• Real-time dashboard for YouTube streaming

https://www.youtube.com/live/EgTToPaA8v0?si=4IFgM9Q2BBPgasGw

The interesting part is we stopped focusing on “high accuracy” and instead optimized for:

→ risk/reward quality  
→ trade filtering  
→ avoiding noise  
→ accountability via TP/SL tracking

That alone improved results massively.

Current realistic stats after filtering weak setups:

• BTC directional accuracy: \~61–67%  
• Gold directional accuracy: \~58–64%  
• RR filtered trades only  
• Lower frequency but much cleaner entries

The biggest surprise:  
Removing low RR trades improved performance more than tweaking the model itself.

Also added:  
• multi-timeframe support/resistance  
• live session overlays  
• macro/news context  
• automated trade outcome tracking

The dashboard is now running as a live finance stream and honestly looks closer to a Bloomberg/TradingView hybrid than what we originally planned 😄

Still improving:  
• AI voice commentary  
• volatility regime detection  
• adaptive models per asset  
• automated Shorts clipping for major moves

If anyone is building algo systems or wants to fine-tune models for specific assets (crypto, forex, metals, indices etc.), DM me. Happy to share what worked and what completely failed during development.

Would genuinely love feedback from other quant/dev people here.

comments.author: themoneylust
comments.body: An update: forecast is live on www.aigoldforecast.com
